name: deploy-test
description: Minimal Nuxt 4 + Postgres + better-auth starter for validating one-click deploy flows (Vercel / Cloudflare Workers / Docker).

scripts.build: pnpm migrate && nuxt build && mkdir -p .output/server/db && cp -r server/db/migrations .output/server/db/migrations

POSTGRES.description: Hyperdrive config pointing at your Postgres. [Create one first](https://developers.cloudflare.com/hyperdrive/) with `wrangler hyperdrive create`, then select it here.

DATABASE_URL.description: **Build-time only.** Used during `pnpm migrate` to run schema migrations. Must point at the **same Postgres** as the `POSTGRES` Hyperdrive binding above. At runtime the Worker reads through Hyperdrive.

BETTER_AUTH_SECRET.description: Session / cookie encryption secret. **Required**. Generate a 32+ char random string with `openssl rand -hex 32`.

SYSTEM_ADMIN_EMAILS.description: Comma-separated emails. The **first** sign-up with a matching email is auto-promoted to admin. Example: `you@example.com`. Change before sharing the deploy URL.

GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.description: Optional. Google OAuth client ID. Create at [console.cloud.google.com](https://console.cloud.google.com/auth/clients/create) with redirect `https://<your-worker>.workers.dev/api/auth/callback/google`.

GITHUB_CLIENT_ID.description: Optional. GitHub OAuth client ID. Create at [github.com/settings/applications/new](https://github.com/settings/applications/new) with callback `https://<your-worker>.workers.dev/api/auth/callback/github`.

AUTH_EMAIL_ENABLED.description: Optional. `true` / `false`. Default: enabled iff no OAuth is configured.

RESEND_API_KEY.description: Optional. When set, email verification auto-activates on signup. Get one at [resend.com/api-keys](https://resend.com/api-keys).

RESEND_FROM.description: Optional. From address for verification mails. Defaults to `onboarding@resend.dev`.

AUTH_EMAIL_VERIFICATION.description: Optional. `true` / `false`. Default: enabled iff email login is on and `RESEND_API_KEY` is set.
